mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_field_value_stats (tenant_id, template_id, field_name, field_value, submitter_id, frequency, last_used_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{templateId}, #{fieldName}, #{fieldValue}, #{submitterId}, #{frequency}, #{lastUsedAt}, #{updatedAt})

INSERT INTO form_field_value_stats (tenant_id, template_id, field_name, field_value, submitter_id, frequency, last_used_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{templateId}, #{fieldName}, #{fieldValue}, #{submitterId}, 1, #{lastUsedAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE frequency = frequency + 1, last_used_at = #{lastUsedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, template_id, field_name, field_value, submitter_id, frequency, last_used_at, updated_at FROM form_field_value_stats WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND field_name = #{fieldName} AND submitter_id = '__GLOBAL__' AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY frequency DESC, last_used_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM form_field_value_stats WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
